dealSummary: AI financial services platform developer Rogo secured a $160 million Series D led by Kleiner Perkins.
Hightouch, the developer of a marketing data platform, raised a $150 million Series D led by Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives.
leadInvestors: Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives

dealSummary: Aidoc, which develops clinical AI tools for healthcare, received a $150 million Series E led by Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives.
leadInvestors: Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives

dealSummary: Defense tech startup Scout AI secured a $100 million Series A led by Align Ventures and Draper Associates.
Parallel Web Systems, the developer of infrastructure for AI agents to access the web, raised a $100 million Series B led by Sequoia at a $2 billion valuation.
Defense tech manufacturing startup Firestorm Labs secured an $82 million Series B led by Washington Harbour Partners.
Axoft, a startup developing implantable brain-computer interface devices, raised a $55 million Series A led by CP Group Innovation.
Los Angeles-based insurance company Counterpart received a $50 million Series C led by Valor Equity Partners.
Berlin-based engineering intelligence specialist Spread AI raised a $30 million Series B from investors including DTCP, IQT and OTB Ventures.
Fence, the developer of an asset-backed finance infrastructure platform, raised a $20 million round led by Galaxy Ventures.
All3, a London-based construction robotics developer, received a $25 million seed round led by RTP Global.
